function.rulebook_notes: Used canonical entity records in 10_entities/cast as authoritative for relationships and birthdays.
function.outcome_justification: Petra's canonical file (10_entities/cast/petra.md) identifies Petra as spouse; Renate's canonical file (10_entities/cast/renate.md) identifies relationship mother_in_law and lists birthday 1961-07-06, which corresponds to Petra's mother in this context.
